description: OpenTransportData is a Swiss mobility open-data platform for transport datasets and APIs, including timetable, realtime, journey planning, fares, and road-traffic data. Its public website provides dataset catalogs, cookbook documentation, and access management for those services.
summary: opentransportdata.org itself exposes no documented developer integration surfaces; the public developer docs point instead to APIs on opentransportdata.swiss and api.opentransportdata.swiss authenticated with API-manager-issued Bearer API keys.
